FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Class CommandBar

Namespace
FluentGpu.Controls
Assembly
FluentGpu.Controls.dll

A WinUI CommandBar (CommandBar_themeresources.xaml): a horizontal toolbar of primary commands with a trailing "…" MoreButton that opens the SECONDARY commands as an overflow menu and expands the bar.

  • Closed — chromeless: Background = CommandBarBackground = ControlFillColorTransparent (:9), no border; height = AppBarThemeCompactHeight 48 (:72) in Compact mode (icon-only buttons), 24 in Minimal, 0 in Hidden.
  • Open — Background swaps to CommandBarBackgroundOpen = AcrylicInAppFillColorDefault (:10) with the ControlCornerRadius 4 + OpenBorder; primary buttons grow to the labeled 64px FullSize layout (ContentTransform.Y → CompactVerticalDelta) and the overflow popup opens under the … button. The WinUI DisplayModeStates storyboards run the open leg over ControlNormalAnimationDuration (250ms) and the close leg over ControlFastAnimationDuration (167ms), both on the ControlFastOutSlowInKeySpline 0,0,0,1 (:124-247 CompactClosed↔CompactOpenUp/Down VisualTransitions) — the bar's height/label reveal rides a matching LayoutTransition tween; the overflow popup itself is the overlay's menu reveal.
  • Overflow — CommandBarOverflowPresenter: MinWidth 160 / MaxWidth 480 (:5/:7), acrylic + transient-border chrome from the overlay's FlyoutSurface; secondary commands render as Overflow-state AppBarButtons (icons + toggle checks + right-aligned accelerator text) with AppBarSeparator Overflow rows.
  • MoreButton — Width 48 (AppBarExpandButtonThemeWidth, generic.xaml:23), E712 ellipsis, subtle fills, inner-border margin 2,6,6,6 (AppBarEllipsisButtonInnerBorderMargin :73), FocusVisualMargin −3.
  • IsSticky — a non-sticky open bar light-dismisses (click-outside/Escape closes); sticky stays open until the … button is clicked again (WinUI AppBar sticky semantics).
public sealed class CommandBar : Component

WinUI Opening/Closing pair, collapsed to one callback (true = opening).

OverflowMaxWidth 

public const float OverflowMaxWidth = 480

OverflowMinWidth

Field Value

float

PartBar

The bar root row (the WinUI LayoutRoot grid). Owned: Animate (the open/close height tween — Bounds+Reveal on the WinUI storyboard timings), Children (the command row).

public const string PartBar = "Bar"

Field Value

string

PartOverflowButton

The trailing … More button (WinUI MoreButton). Owned: OnClick (the open/close toggle), Role, OnRealized (the overflow anchor capture, chained with any modifier-supplied handler).

public const string PartOverflowButton = "OverflowButton"

Field Value

string

PartOverflowMenu

The overflow popup body (the CommandBarOverflowPresenter content — popup-built each open, so modifiers run inside the overlay body's render). Owned: Children (the secondary command rows).

public const string PartOverflowMenu = "OverflowMenu"

Field Value

string

Parts

Lightweight per-part styling (CSS ::part): modifiers keyed by the PartXxx consts; see TemplateParts for the contract.

public TemplateParts? Parts

public static Element Create(IReadOnlyList<AppBarCommand> primaryCommands, IReadOnlyList<AppBarCommand> secondaryCommands, CommandBarDisplayMode closedDisplayMode = CommandBarDisplayMode.Compact, bool isSticky = false, Action<bool>? onOpenChanged = null)

primaryCommands IReadOnlyList<AppBarCommand>
secondaryCommands IReadOnlyList<AppBarCommand>
closedDisplayMode CommandBarDisplayMode
isSticky bool
onOpenChanged Action<bool>

Returns

Element

Create(IReadOnlyList<CommandBarButton>)

Legacy shim: a static chromeless icon row (the pre-Wave-3 surface) — kept so existing call sites compile; the commands map to compact AppBarButtons with a working overflow-less More button.

public static BoxEl Create(IReadOnlyList<CommandBarButton> commands)

Parameters

commands IReadOnlyList<CommandBarButton>

Returns

BoxEl

Returns

Element
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
